entities.description: mosquitto sub is a command line tool used to subscribe to mqtt topics
mqtt is a protocol used for messaging between devices  mentioned in the context of subscription and publishing
broker hivemq com is the hostname of the mqtt server being used for communication
test data is an mqtt topic that can be customized for message subscription
tcp is a protocol used for establishing communication over the network  mentioned in the context of mqtt port configuration
command line refers to the interface used to execute the mosquitto sub tool

relations.description: mosquitto sub is a tool that operates within the mqtt protocol framework
mosquitto sub connects to the mqtt server at broker hivemq com
mosquitto sub subscribes to the mqtt topic test data
broker hivemq com is the server that hosts the mqtt protocol
tcp is the protocol used to establish the connection for mqtt communication
